data.title: US-China Trade Tensions Poses Risk To Merit Medical's $150 Million Revenue From China
data.description: Merit Medical guides below consensus on FY25 EPS, projects up to $1.49 billion revenue, and faces tariff risks amid ongoing global manufacturing expansion.

data.title: Gold Miners Go Parabolic: GDX Hits 2012 Highs, Newmont Soars 9%
data.description: Investors are flocking to gold-backed ETFs as global tensions and uncertainty drive up gold prices. Gold miners also see record demand.

data.title: Deal Dispatch: Harley-Davidson To Wipe Out? Plus, Prada's Versace Purchase Garners A Fashionable Price
data.description: Things are hog wild at Harley-Davidson; Plus, Impresoft, Keros Therapeutics and Rivalry Corp. are all itching for a deal.

data.title: AGNC Expects Strong Income For Q1, Softer Book Value: Analyst Sees Recovery Potential
data.description: Analyst Jason Weaver shares thoughts on AGNC's Q1 numbers, with net spread income higher than estimates. TBV declined, but market volatility may ease.

data.title: BofA Survey Reveals Americans Cutting Back On Homes, Buying Dumbbells Instead
data.description: BofA Securities' April consumer survey reveals a sharp decline in home and appliance purchase plans. Only 18% of respondents intend to buy a new home in the next year, down from 23% in February. Appliance purchase interest also hit a three-year low. These findings suggest shifting consumer priorities amid economic uncertainty.
